headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -29.1)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 60% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 124 quotes and an unusually high proportion of strong-intensity hits (89 of 124), driving the score up to 33.9 — people are venting loudly today.
• Frustration levels are elevated but still well below the 171-day peak of 169.7, suggesting this is a noisy but not exceptional day historically.
• Optimism slipped further into negative territory from yesterday (-8.0 to -20.4), while Fears improved slightly, though both remain subdued with limited strong-intensity activity.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
